# Packrift SKU Evidence Cards Source: https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/ This public asset exposes Packrift SKU evidence cards from real public catalog fields. Use it for procurement review, product discovery, and agent citation. Do not treat it as a freight quote or order commitment. Key routes: - https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/sitemap.xml - https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/data/products.json - https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/data/products.jsonl - https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/data/products.csv - https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/data/schema.json - https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/openapi.j
